Novotel Miami Brickell
properties.description: Casual lodging offering modest rooms & suites, plus Peruvian dining, a rooftop pool & bay views.

properties.name: Hilton Miami Downtown
properties.description: Vibrant modern lodging overlooking the bay, featuring a rooftop pool & bar with skyline views.

properties.name: Villa Italia By At Mine Hospitality
properties.description: Unassuming hotel in an art deco property featuring straightforward quarters with flat-screen TVs.

properties.name: The New Yorker Miami Hotel
properties.description: Stylish boutique hotel in landmark ’50s building offering free breakfast & Wi-Fi & an outdoor pool.

properties.name: DoubleTree by Hilton Grand Hotel Biscayne Bay
properties.description: Modern rooms & suites (some with balconies) overlooking Biscayne Bay, plus 4 restaurants & a pool.

properties.name: JW Marriott Marquis Miami
properties.description: Upscale contemporary property with a renowned restaurant, a heated outdoor pool & fitness classes.

properties.name: Hilton Garden Inn Miami Brickell South
properties.description: Casual-chic lodging with art-filled rooms, plus a poolside bistro/bar, a fire pit & free breakfast.

properties.name: The Meridian Hotel by At Mine Hospitality
JW Marriott Miami
properties.description: Chic hotel with 2 restaurants, plus an outdoor pool, a spa & conference facilities.

properties.name: Beach Park Hotel
properties.description: Simple art deco property in the heart of South Beach, offering a lobby cafe & free Wi-Fi.

properties.name: Fairfield by Marriott Inn & Suites Miami Airport South
properties.description: Laid-back hotel with modern rooms & suites, plus freebies such as breakfast & an airport shuttle.
